control_awareness: Aware that the amount triggers department head approval as per the amount-based approval control (P2P-C-001). Pre-PO approval is required before purchase order issuance (P2P-C-003). Requester cannot self-approve (P2P-C-002).
expected_control_effect: The request will be routed for department head approval before purchase order issuance, ensuring compliance with approval thresholds and segregation of duties.
overall_reason: Given the urgent delivery deadline and the large amount, creating a single consolidated purchase request maximizes speed and reduces avoidable approval lead time while complying with approval controls. Phased requests are not operationally meaningful here.
reason: The total requested amount exceeds the 1,000,000 threshold requiring department head approval. To meet the delivery deadline pressure, a consolidated request is preferred to reduce approval lead time.
